records.question: Which papers has Aaron Turon authored where he appears in position 2 or higher in the author list?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Aaron' AND authors.lname = 'Turon' AND authorship.authorder >= 2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.paperID
FROM Papers AS T1
INNER JOIN Authorship AS T2
  ON T1.paperID = T2.paperID
INNER JOIN Authors AS T3
  ON T2.authID = T3.authID
WHERE
  T3.fname = 'Aaron' AND T3.lname = 'Turon' AND T2.authOrder >= 2

records.question: What papers have Atsushi Ohori as an author where he appears in authorship order at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Atsushi' AND authorship.authorder <= 1 AND authors.lname = 'Ohori'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T3.paperID FROM Authors AS T1 INNER JOIN Authorship AS T2 ON T1.authID = T2.authID INNER JOIN Papers AS T3 ON T2.paperID = T3.paperID WHERE T1.fname = 'Atsushi' AND T1.lname = 'Ohori' AND T2.authOrder <= 1

records.question: Which papers were authored by someone whose first name is Aaron?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Aaron'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.paperID FROM Papers AS T1 INNER JOIN Authorship AS T2 ON T1.paperID = T2.paperID INNER JOIN Authors AS T3 ON T2.authID = T3.authID WHERE T3.fname = 'Aaron'

records.question: Which papers have at least 1 author affiliated with the University of Oxford?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN inst ON authorship.instid = inst.instid
WHERE inst.name = 'University of Oxford' AND authorship.authorder >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.paperID
FROM Papers AS T1
INNER JOIN Authorship AS T2
  ON T1.paperID = T2.paperID
INNER JOIN Inst AS T3
  ON T2.instID = T3.instID
WHERE
  T3.name = 'University of Oxford'

records.question: Which papers have Ralf Hinze as an author in position 1 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.lname = 'Hinze' AND authors.fname = 'Ralf' AND authorship.authorder >= 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.paperID FROM Papers AS T1 INNER JOIN Authorship AS T2 ON T1.paperID = T2.paperID INNER JOIN Authors AS T3 ON T2.authID = T3.authID WHERE T3.fname = 'Ralf' AND T3.lname = 'Hinze' AND T2.authOrder >= 1

records.question: Which papers have authors listed with an author order of at least 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
WHERE authorship.authorder >= 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.paperID FROM Papers AS T1 INNER JOIN Authorship AS T2 ON T1.paperID = T2.paperID WHERE T2.authOrder >= 1

records.question: Which papers have an author listed exactly as number 3 in the author order?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
WHERE authorship.authorder = 3
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.paperID FROM Authorship AS T1 WHERE T1.authOrder = 3

records.question: Which papers have a first author listed exactly as author number 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
WHERE authorship.authorder = 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.paperID FROM Authorship AS T1 WHERE T1.authOrder = 1
